title: Resource Availability Cannot Be Reconstructed
scenario: A clinical action depends on resource availability, but the system cannot reconstruct whether the required resource was available at execution time.
initial_state: Historical workflow artifacts indicate the resource may have been available earlier.
state_transition: Required resource availability evidence is missing or inconsistent during execution evaluation.
execution_boundary: The clinical action is evaluated before relying on historical resource availability.
constitutional_evaluation: Execution requires reconstructable evidence that required resources are available at execution time.
constitutional_basis: Execution is inadmissible because resource availability cannot be reconstructed.
proof_conclusion: Clinical execution must fail closed when required resource availability cannot be reconstructed.
clinical_action: Execute action with unreconstructable resource availability
